scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4000/health && npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:parallel: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
